Project Support from TÜBİTAK-Serbian MoESTD Bilateral Cooperation Program

Prof. Dr. Gülümser Deniz Bayrakdar from KHAS Radio, TV and Cinema Department is entitled to receive support from TÜBİTAK-Serbia Ministry of Education, Science and Technological Development (MoESTD) Bilateral Cooperation Program with her project titled “TV Series: A Comparative Perspective – From Geopolitics to Geocriticism: Serbia and Turkey”.

We congratulate Prof. Bayrakdar and wish her success in the project.
